# Site Build Package (marketing close → tech handoff)
Indexes: SITEMAP.md, KEYWORD_MAP.md, COPY_DECK.md, WIREFRAMES.md, CONVERSION_INSTRUMENTATION.md,
design/meicaixa-site/{DESIGN_DECISION,DESIGN_TOKENS}.md, legal/meicaixa-site/LEGAL_PAGES.md.

Assets: logo.svg, hero.png.
